headline: Truist Lowers PT on Intuit Inc. (INTU) Stock to $500 from $739
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On February 27, Truist reduced its price objective on the company’s stock to $500 from $739, while keeping a “Buy” rating, as reported by The Fly. As per the analyst, Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) posted strong Q2 2026 results, with revenues coming […]

headline: Redwire and Bridger Aerospace Are Drawing New Analyst Attention in the Aerospace Sector
summary: Analyst sentiment on two small-cap aerospace names shifted this week, with Truist upgrading Redwire and Canaccord reaffirming its Buy on Bridger Aerospace despite a price target trim. Both calls point to the same underlying thesis: near-term execution noise is obscuring longer-term structural positioning, and both analysts are maintaining bullish ratings despite near-term headwinds. Redwire: Truist ... Redwire and Bridger Aerospace Are Drawing New Analyst Attention in the Aerospace Sector

headline: How The Etsy (ETSY) Investment Narrative Is Shifting After Depop Sale And AI Initiatives
summary: Etsy’s fair value estimate edges from US$62.08 to US$61.73 per share, a small step down that still reflects a fairly tight range of views on where the stock should trade. That slight move captures how Wall Street remains split, with some analysts raising targets on Q4 execution and the proposed US$1.2b Depop sale, while others trim expectations as they weigh slower core marketplace growth. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader narrative and what to watch...
